name: 2033 the order
short_description: A horizontal board strategy action adventure game, all actions require stamina consumption, manage stamina correctly, and fight with caution Attack, defense, rebound, roll, jump, stun, interrupt attack, and enhance various numerical values Rich mechanisms await discovery.
detailed_description: A horizontal board strategy action game where players and enemies expend energy in all their actions, so be cautious before acquiring powerful skills. The game includes a variety of skills to enhance the player's strength, not only enhancing combat effectiveness, but also making basic movements more fluent. A plethora of skills, attack methods, weapons, and unique characters await your discovery.
about_the_game: A horizontal board strategy action game where players and enemies expend energy in all their actions, so be cautious before acquiring powerful skills. The game includes a variety of skills to enhance the player's strength, not only enhancing combat effectiveness, but also making basic movements more fluent. A plethora of skills, attack methods, weapons, and unique characters await your discovery.
supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Korean
